replies.message: Java is a popular, high-level, and object-oriented programming language designed by Sun Microsystems (now Oracle) in 1995. It is designed to be platform-independent, meaning code written once can run on any device (computer, phone, server) equipped with a Java Virtual Machine (JVM). It is widely used for web, mobile, and enterprise applications.

Python is a high-level, interpreted, and general-purpose programming language known for its simple, readable syntax, which emphasizes code readability and supports multiple paradigms like object-oriented, procedural, and functional programming

What is Python programming? - techknowledgehubPython is a high-level, interpreted, and general-purpose programming language known for its simple, readable syntax, which emphasizes code readability and supports multiple paradigms like object-oriented, procedural, and functional programming. It is widely used for web development, data science, AI/machine learning, and automation, making it popular among beginners and professionals alike.
Python is a high-level, interpreted, and general-purpose programming language known for its simple, easy-to-read syntax that emphasizes readability.

Java is a popular, high-level, and object-oriented programming language designed by Sun Microsystems (now Oracle) in 1995. It is designed to be platform-independent, meaning code written once can run on any device (computer, phone, server) equipped with a Java Virtual Machine (JVM). It is widely used for web, mobile, and enterprise applications.

Java is a popular, high-level, and object-oriented programming language designed to be platform-independent, meaning code written once can run on any device (Write Once, Run Anywhere - WORA). It is widely used to build mobile apps (Android), web apps, enterprise software, and big data applications.
